message:
撰写 Methodology 子节 3.1 Overall Framework。

★ 字数要求：400词
★ 写入路径：/home/liaowenjie/.openclaw-multi/shared/paper-project-4/drafts/v1/section_method_3.1.tex

内容要求：
- High-level overview of CESM-Diff architecture (refer to Fig.1)
- Input: vibration signals + CLIP-encoded fault descriptions
- Output: generated fault features for unseen classes
- Three-stage pipeline: semantic extraction → dual-path diffusion → manifold interpolation

这是第一个 Method 子节，无前序依赖。

完成后回报实际字数。
